summary: Go-Live Completion Pack testing completed - 11/11 backend tests passed (100%). Business Settings API, Go-Live Readiness Validator, and Canonical Collection for Quotes/Invoices all working correctly. Frontend Business Settings page loads and save functionality works.

business_settings_get.notes: Returns settings with auto-seed if empty. Contains all expected fields (company_name, currency, sku_prefix, quote_collection_mode, invoice_collection_mode)

business_settings_put.notes: Updates settings successfully. Data persistence verified via GET after PUT.

go_live_readiness.notes: Returns score/total with 19 checks. Status correctly shows 'needs_attention'. Checks include company, banking, email (resend), and payment (kwikpay) requirements.

quotes_v2_list.notes: Lists quotes from canonical collection with fallback to legacy collection. Deduplication by quote_number works correctly.

quotes_v2_create.notes: Creates quote in canonical collection. Quote number auto-generated (QTN-YYYYMMDD-XXXXXX format).

quotes_v2_get_by_id.notes: Retrieves specific quote with fallback to legacy collection.

invoices_v2_list.notes: Lists invoices from canonical collection with fallback to legacy collection.

quote_pdf_export.notes: PDF export works with collection mode. Returns valid PDF with correct Content-Type.

invoice_pdf_export.notes: PDF export works with collection mode. Returns valid PDF with correct Content-Type.

frontend_business_settings_page.notes: Page loads correctly. Shows Go-Live Readiness card with 9/19 checks. All form sections present (Company Identity, Address, Commercial, Banking & Inventory). Save functionality works - data persists and readiness score updates.

collection_mode_implementation.fallback_behavior: If document not found in canonical collection, falls back to legacy collection
collection_mode_implementation.deduplication: Combines both collections and dedupes by quote_number/invoice_number

critical_code_review_comments: business_settings_routes.py: Clean implementation with auto-seed on first GET. Correctly excludes _id from response.
go_live_readiness_routes.py: Comprehensive 19-check validator covering company info, banking, and third-party integrations (Resend, KwikPay).
collection_mode_service.py: Simple helper that reads from business_settings to determine which collection to use.
All routes properly use get_quote_collection() and get_invoice_collection() from collection_mode_service
PDF export routes correctly use collection mode with fallback

success_rate.frontend: 100% (Business Settings page loads and functions correctly)

seed_data_creation: Test quotes created with TEST_ prefix for verification. Business settings updated with TEST_ prefixed values.

mocked_apis_list: Resend email service - no RESEND_API_KEY configured (shows as Missing in readiness)
KwikPay payment service - no KWIKPAY_* keys configured (shows as Missing in readiness)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Go-Live Completion Pack fully tested. Business settings API works with auto-seed. Go-live readiness shows 9/19 checks (missing: logo, tax_number, brn, bank_account_name/number, resend_key, sender_email, kwikpay keys). Collection mode service properly routes quotes/invoices to v2 collections by default. PDF export works with collection mode fallback.
